title: Cobblemon: Run & Bun Trainer DP
description: Adds 26 new gym leader fights across 2 full series. Competitive movesets and is dependent on the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod and the Run & Bun API addon to work.
body:
### **Custom Trainers:**

26 Unique gym leader fights, split across two arcs of progression.
Competitive movesets, themed teams, and double battles, leading to highly difficult combat.

### **Gym Fights Added:**

**(Space ark)**

BROCK, ERIKA, MISTY, CHEREN, BUGSY, FLANNERY, OLYMPIA, WINONA, //ELITE 4: STEVEN, PHEOBE, JANINE, GIOVANNI, //CHAMP: ASTRO

**(Apocalypse ark)**

FALKNER, VIOLA, MORTY, SABRINA, MILO, GRIMSLEY, VALERIE, MAYLENE, //ELITE 4: GLACIA, DRAKE, WALLACE, WATTSON, //CHAMP: GRETA

### **IMPORTANT!!** 

This DP is intended to be used in tandem with the Cobblemon: Run and Bun (Advanced Trainer API). All battles will run Run and Bun AI.

[Battle AI Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-recobbled-(advanced-trainer-ai)): Check out my AI trainer code; combined with this DP, you can spawn some cool fights. 

[Texture Pack for Trainers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/astro-mons-resourcepack): This will give the trainers proper skins in-game.

[Trainer Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1zTllbqD_vIIF0aMywfAouUgsLWapIuibn65M7e_FPuc/edit?usp=sharing): Shows each Gym's Pokepaste, Level Cap, Name, and Theme.

### **PSA:** 

You can summon them by command/command block. 

Example: /rctmod trainer summon space_brock :: /rctmod trainer summon apocalypse_falkner

**Version 2.0+** Gym leaders can now be found in the wild. The white-listed biome tags are listed below. 

**Version 2.1+** Will have a sharp increase in difficulty. I would recommend being prepared to be frustrated and ready to flex your Pokémon knowledge

**Version 2.2** Will have some tweaks and adjustments to fights. Pokémon under level 70 will have no IV spread. Legendaries in the first 8 gyms will have their EV's reduced to 120 total. Some Pokémon will have their level reduced by 1 or 2. 

Natural Spawning Info:

Space:
- Brock: "is_temperate", "is_hills" 
- Erika: "is_floral", "is_savanna"
- Misty: "is_tropical_island", "is_coast", "is_freshwater"
- Cheren: "is_grassland", "is_beach"
- Bugsy: "is_forest", "is_swamp", "is_jungle"
- Flannery: "is_savanna", "is_desert", "is_badlands"
- Olympia: "is_swamp", "is_mushroom", "is_warm_ocean"
- Winona: "is_hills", "is_highlands", "is_mountain"
- Steven: "is_basalt", "is_desert", "is_hills", "is_volcanic"
- Pheobe: "is_spooky", "is_nether_desert", "is_dense"
- Janine: "is_swamp", "is_mushroom", "is_forest", "is_jungle"
- Giovanni: "is_deep_dark", "is_nether", "is_badlands", "is_island"
- Champ Astro: "is_peak", "is_mountain"

Apocalypse: 
- Falkner: "is_temperate", "is_beach", "is_coast"
- Viola: "is_temperate", "is_swamp", "is_jungle"
- Morty: "is_spooky", "is_swamp", "is_highlands"
- Sabrina: "is_magical", "is_floral"
- Grimsley: "is_magical","is_dripstone","is_lush","is_cave"
- Milo: "is_forest", "is_floral", "is_jungle"
- Valerie: "is_magical", "is_hills", "is_plains"
- Maylene: "is_badlands", "is_beach", "is_highlands"
- Glacia: "is_snowy_forest", "is_taiga", "is_tundra"
- Drake: "is_plateau", "is_peak", "is_mountain"
- Wallace: "is_beach", "is_coast", "is_lukewarm_ocean", "is_tropical_island"
- Wattson: "is_highlands", "is_hills" ,"is_mountain", "is_peak"
- Champ Red: "is_peak", "is_magical", "is_plains"


### **Known Issues**
- Some fights need to be changed and cleaned up
- Some tera types are incorrectly entered
- Some alternate form mons are wrongly added
